title: Poor monkey 🐒
prompt_text: A picturesque mountainous landscape under an overcast sky. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a bright yellow-green knitted sweater and blue jeans, stands on a stone balcony or viewpoint. A small monkey, with light brown fur, sits on a stone pillar to her right. A single red helium balloon is tied to a string, initially held by both the woman and the monkey. Layers of green mountains fade into the distance, creating a sense of vastness and depth.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A picturesque mountainous landscape under an overcast sky. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a bright yellow-green knitted sweater and blue jeans, stands on a stone balcony or viewpoint. A small monkey, with light brown fur, sits on a stone pillar to her right. A single red helium balloon is tied to a string, initially held by both the woman and the monkey. Layers of green mountains fade into the distance, creating a sense of vastness and depth.

cinematography.mood: Playful and whimsical, transitioning to surprised and slightly awe-struck as the monkey ascends. The natural beauty of the mountain setting adds a touch of serene grandeur.
cinematography.cameraShot: Medium shot, initially eye-level, then slowly pans upwards and slightly zooms out to follow the ascending monkey and balloon, maintaining focus on the main subjects. The shot is relatively static apart from the pan.

actions: A young woman holds the string of a red balloon.
A small monkey sits on a stone pillar, holding the balloon string.
The monkey stands up, still clutching the balloon string, and begins to float upwards.
The red balloon carries the monkey higher into the air.
The woman, initially holding the string, releases it as the monkey ascends.
The woman watches the monkey and balloon float away, looking up at the sky.
The camera follows the monkey and balloon as they rise higher above the mountains.
